title: Young researchers need to focus more on agriculture : Interview of Dr. R K Varshney
abstract: The recipient of of Thomson Reuters Citation Award 2015, Dr. Rajeev K Varshney, Director, Center of Excellence at Genomics at the ICRISAT, Hyderabad, shares interest development in the areas of genome sequencing.  I really feel humbled and honoured to receive research excellence citation Award by Thomson Reuters. I would like to dedicate this award to my PhD students, Postdocs, colleagues and collaborators from ICRISAT as well as all other organizations with whom I got an opportunity to work with on different exciting projects...
